title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a framework for building reliable multi-agent systems with support for sequential orchestration, self-correcting loops, context caching, and single-command deployment to Google's Agent Engine. The tutorial demonstrates automating enterprise migrations from Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace using ADK's SequentialAgent and LoopAgent components.
